DEPT. 501: DEFENDANTS 270 TURK , LLC, VERITAS INVESTMENTS, INC, YAT-PANG AU AND GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC 'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS ARGUED, SUBMITTED AND LATER RULED UPON VIA WRITTEN ORDER. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO CLARIFY THE INCONSISTENCIES IN PARAGRAPHS 21 THROUGH 26 TO SHOW A LANDLORD-TENANT RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN MENA AND THE DEFENDANTS. JUDGE: LYNN O. TAYLOR; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Dec-09-2014 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-29-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Lynn O. Taylor; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Aaron H Darsky, Esq. of the Law Offices of Eric L Lifschitz (415-553-6055), attorney for plaintiff/opposing party
Karen Uchiyama, Esq. (415-563-9300), attonrey for defendant/demurring party

Court hears arguments from both sides. Court rules now as follows:

DEFENDANTS 270 TURK , LLC, VERITAS INVESTMENTS, INC, YAT-PANG AU and GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC 's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is taken under submission.

PM: Later this same date, Court rules on submitted matter via written order as follows:

DEFENDANTS 270 TURK , LLC, VERITAS INVESTMENTS, INC, YAT-PANG AU and GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC 's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with 10 days leave to amend to clarify the inconsistencies in paragraphs 21 through 26 to show a landlord-tenant relationship between Mena and the Defendants. The written order is signed and filed in open court.
